'''Feathered Mantle''' is a craftable artifact that makes your dog float.

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Feathered mantle.png
| id = feathered_mantle
| type = Artifacts
| stackable = 1
}}

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Phantom Menbrane<br>+ Feather<br>+ Super Treat
| [[File:Feathered mantle crafting.gif]]
|}
== Usage ==
[[File:Doggy Artifacts menu.gif|thumb]]
* '''<code>Right click</code>''' your dog with a [https://minecraft.wiki/w/Stick Stick] to access the [[Dog Menu]]. Then navigate to the [[Dog Menu|Info Tab]].
* Click on '''<code>Doggy Artifacts</code>''' to equip the item. <br>

== Trivia ==
* The item is a reference to a Japanese Mythology - Hagoromo (羽衣 - The Feather Mantle) <ref>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hagoromo_(play)</ref>
* The Mantle's color was originally Pink.
* It was introduced in DTN 1.15.0.

<references />
